title: Trump asks US for patience amid Iran war and rising gas prices
shortDescription: The war shows no signs of stopping as Trump calls for an uprising in Iran and Republican lawmakers rejected chances to curb his war powers.

title: Gas price per gallon up 27 cents, per AAA. Trump said he’s not concerned
shortDescription: Donald Trump told Reuters he did not “have any concern” about higher gas prices after Iran. AAA found price per gallon is up nearly 27 cents in a week.

title: Rep. Tony Gonzales ends reelection bid after admitting to affair
shortDescription: Rep. Tony Gonzales from Texas has been embroiled in controversy after allegations spread about an affair with his late ex-staffer.

title: Capitol rioter pardoned by Trump gets life for child sex abuse
shortDescription: A Florida man who was pardoned for his role in the Jan. 6, 2021, attack was sentenced to life in prison for molesting two children, prosecutors said.

title: Trump ousts Noem as his deportation push faces setbacks
shortDescription: Trump removed Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem with a March 5 social media post thanking her for her service.

title: Reactions from Capitol Hill after Noem's firing
shortDescription: Kristi Noem's firing comes after a controversial tenure at DHS with nationwide protests, a partial government shutdown and a divisive ad campaign.

title: Trump tells Iran army to surrender
shortDescription: President Trump called on the Iranian army to surrender or “face absolutely guaranteed death” as the conflict in Iran continues to rage on.

title: ¿Quién es Markwayne Mullin? El nuevo líder del DHS nombrado por Trump
shortDescription: Trump eligió al senador Markwayne Mullin como nuevo secretario de Seguridad Nacional. Su perfil combina política, MMA y liderazgo empresarial.

title: Congress won't halt Iran war after resolution fails in House
shortDescription: Republicans in the House of Representatives blocked a war powers resolution that would've immediately stopped U.S. hostilities against Iran.

title: Who is Markwayne Mullin? Trump names new DHS Secretary.
shortDescription: President Trump chose Sen. Markwayne Mullin (R-OK) to replace Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary starting March 31.

title: Did Iran try to kill Trump? About Pete Hegseth's 'last laugh' comment
shortDescription: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said an Iranian unit leader that tried to kill Trump was taken out. How many assassination attempts does that add up to?

title: Can Trump unilaterally start a war with Iran? Can anyone stop him?
shortDescription: The escalating conflict in Iran has thrust foundational legal questions about the president's war powers into the spotlight. Here are answers.

title: Trump replaces Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary after ad campaign
shortDescription: Trump said March 5 he is replacing DHS Secretary Kristi Noem after scrutiny over a $220M ad campaign, naming Sen. Markwayne Mullin as successor.
